prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson guild cloak and reinforced leather armor stands next to Mika Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes. Renji points confidently to a large quest parchment on the wooden guild board, his hand resting near his sword hilt. Mika looks at the parchment, nodding in agreement. Cinematic lighting, warm guild atmosphere, high detail, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Starling carefully peels the quest parchment from the board, holding it up so Renji Dawnblade can see. They both lean in, tracing a path on the map with their fingers, coordinating their strategy for the Deep Ruins expedition. Consistent character appearance, cinematic camera, warm lighting, no text, no watermark.
